description: R2b L3 call-graph goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Each <fixture>.l3cg.golden.json is the ALLOWLISTED call-graph projection of a RESOLVED SemanticModel, READ post-resolve / pre-summary (`indexWorkspace` → `resolveModel` ONCE; the dump NEVER re-runs resolveCalls/upgradeBindings — upgradeBindings is non-idempotent). Per callsite: the CallEdge[] GROUP (multi-edge interface dispatch preserved) in stable id form (StableRoutineId / StableCallsiteId) — from/to?/operationId/dispatchKind/resolution/candidates?/externalTypeRef?/receiverType?, with dispatchMeta (interfaceName/totalImpls/unresolvedImpls/enumImplementers — NO openWorld) projected at the GROUP level. Plus the UPGRADED argumentBindings (calleeParameterIsVar/bindingResolution/sourceTableId-as-StableTableId). See scripts/r2b-l3cg-projection.ts.
capturePoint: post-resolve/pre-summary (indexWorkspace → resolveModel ONCE; READ-ONLY, no re-resolve)
note: R2b reads the resolved model.callGraph (resolveCalls + buildImplicitTriggerEdges output) + the in-place-upgraded CallSite.argumentBindings. EXCLUDED (later gates / not-L3-clean): typedEdges (L4/R3), RoutineSummary (L4), coverage/gaps (R2d), event graph (R2c), callsiteResolutions (dropped — not certified L3-clean). dispatchMeta has NO openWorld field. Interface RESOLVED impl edges carry resolution 'maybe' (multi-edge counted independently of resolution=='resolved'). opaque vs external-target is governed by hasUnfetchedDeclaredDependency (a GLOBAL boolean). Cross-app targets (.app deps) → R2.5.

exclusions.reason: empty model (0 objects/0 routines) — fail-closed single-app provider; not source-only-analyzable
